noise: Anthropic has launched Anthropic Academy, a new platform offering free online courses focused on mastering its Claude AI models. These courses, available via Skilljar and Coursera, provide official certification without requiring a paid Claude subscription.
translation: For European SMBs, this isn't just free training; it's a strategic opportunity to upskill your team in a leading AI tool without significant cost or complexity. It means your staff can immediately gain practical, certified AI literacy, improving productivity and demystifying AI integration into daily operations.
action: I’ve seen the immediate return from practical application. I recommend your team members dedicate a few hours weekly to these courses. Start with "Claude 101" for a quick win on everyday tasks, then move to "AI Fluency Framework & Foundations" for safe collaboration. For those building integrations or automating, the "Developer Deep-Dives" offer advanced skills. The value isn't just the certificate; it's the immediate, tangible efficiency gains in your operations. Find all courses at anthropic.skilljar.com.

sources.label: Free Claude AI Courses: Your Next Step
